scripts.electron:dev: tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && concurrently -k -n "next,tsc,electron" -c "cyan,magenta,yellow" "next dev -p 3001" "tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3001 && electron ."
scripts.electron:build: next build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.electron:build:mac: next build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.electron:build:win: next build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.electron:build:linux: next build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.js
